source_components.v6_normalization_note: Removed seed_6a_global_opt_out_registry from 6B.10 normalized targets in v6. Source 6A.11 (communication gateway opt-out) does not ground a hard payment-processing dependency on marketing-communication opt-out. Payment processing operates independently of communication consent preferences. Removed seed_6a_api_key_scope_registry from 6B.10 normalized hard targets pending manual-review of API-key scope direction (consume vs. register/publish).
